UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores extended user information for accounts.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short bio for the user profile.

interests.description: List of selected interest categories for feed personalization.

onboardingComplete.description: Whether the user has finished the initial interest selection.

SavedWebsite.title: Saved Website
SavedWebsite.description: Represents a website saved by a user.

websiteId.description: The ID of the website from the mock data.

/users/{userId}/savedWebsites/{saveId}.description: Collection of websites saved by the user.
